title: Add contract mint tool

tasks.title: Add deterministic contract mint parser
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/validator/contract-mint.test.ts failed because ./contract-mint did not exist. GREEN: same command passed (4 tests). Implemented deterministic agreement-to-ChangeContract parser with anchored section/label mapping, stable IDs, source hash, approvedAt, evidence policies, and schema validation.

tasks.title: Preserve contract proof during workflow seed and re-import
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/temporal/workflow-start.test.ts src/storage/store-temporal/index.test.ts failed because reImportChangeState and poisoned re-seed did not preserve contract proof fields. GREEN: same command passed (14 tests). Added Change projection fields and propagated contract, acceptanceCriteria, documents, artifacts, and lastSignalAt through mapTemporalChangeStateToChange, reImportChangeState, and reseedChangeFromDisk.

tasks.title: Add production contract MCP tools and registration
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/contract.test.ts failed because ./contract tool module did not exist. GREEN: same command passed (4 tests). Added adv_contract_mint and adv_contract_review_matrix_set production tools, healthy signal paths through fireSignalAndRefresh, dry-run handling, review-matrix ID validation, and tool-registry/degraded-name registration.

tasks.title: Add precise poisoned-history recovery path for contract tools
tasks.verification: GREEN: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/contract.test.ts src/storage/store-temporal/index.test.ts passed (18 tests). Added shared precise poisoned-history classifier, rewired store projection recovery to use it, and added guarded contract/review-matrix disk recovery requiring recoveryEvidence, poisoned marker or precise poisoned signal error, _recoveryMutation output, and reconciliation warning. Missing-workflow errors do not authorize recovery.

tasks.title: Expose compatibilityReason on adv_gate_complete with acceptance-only recovery fallback
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/gate.test.ts failed for missing compatibilityReason forwarding, non-acceptance rejection, and poisoned-history disk recovery. GREEN: same command passed (19 tests). Added acceptance-only compatibilityReason arg, signal payload forwarding, precise poisoned-history acceptance disk recovery with readiness/prior-gate/task checks, and reconciliation warning.

tasks.title: Align ADV command docs and asset tests with contract tools
tasks.verification: GREEN: pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts passed (50 tests). Updated adv-discover to call adv_contract_mint, adv-review to call adv_contract_review_matrix_set, added poisoned-history recovery notes, and pinned tool names in asset tests.

tasks.title: Verify contract recovery change end-to-end
tasks.verification: Post-review remediation checkpoint. adv-reviewer verdict READY; remediations: unrecognized labels fall back to deterministic IDs, review matrix tool accepts rows or complete reviewMatrix, docs evidence-policy mapping aligned. Verification after remediation: focused 6-file suite passed (96 tests); pnpm run check passed.

tasks.title: Enforce discovery contract readiness structurally
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/temporal/gate-readiness.test.ts failed because discovery allowed agreement without contract. GREEN: same command passed (11 tests). Added DISCOVERY_CONTRACT_MISSING structural readiness blocker when agreement document/artifact exists and contract is absent; pre-agreement discovery remains unblocked.

tasks.title: Make contract mint usable before discovery completion
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/contract.test.ts failed because adv_contract_mint required discovery.completed_at. GREEN: same command passed (10 tests). Added optional approvedAt arg and defaulted approvedAt to discovery completion timestamp or current time when minting before discovery completion.

tasks.title: Add bootstrap/reload and pre-acceptance contract preflight guidance
tasks.verification: RED: pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts failed for missing DISCOVERY_CONTRACT_MISSING/reload/preflight guidance. GREEN: same command passed (52 tests). Added discover remediation ordering, review pre-acceptance contract/live-tool preflight, prep Tool Registration Bootstrap checklist, and asset assertions.

tasks.title: Verify re-entry contract miss prevention fixes
tasks.verification: Review remediation complete. Red tests were added for invalid approvedAt, unsafe change IDs, reviewMatrix validation asymmetry, poisoned-history review-matrix recovery, and task contract_refs referential integrity. GREEN: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/contract.test.ts src/tools/task.test.ts src/tools/gate.test.ts src/temporal/workflow-start.test.ts src/storage/store-temporal/index.test.ts src/temporal/workflow-bundle-boundary.test.ts src/temporal/workflows.test.ts src/validator/contract-mint.test.ts passed (89 tests). pnpm run check passed. pnpm run build passed.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal/problem statement via reply: approve

discovery.approval_evidence: User approved agreement via reply: approve. Discovery findings and agreement persisted; design can proceed.

design.approval_evidence: Re-entry design addendum persisted to fix acceptance-contract miss prevention. User requested fixing all identified points now; no product tradeoff or validator conflict introduced.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved re-entry prep task graph via reply: approve

execution.approval_evidence: Re-entry execution complete. Added structural DISCOVERY_CONTRACT_MISSING readiness, made adv_contract_mint usable before discovery completion, added bootstrap/reload and pre-acceptance contract preflight guidance. Focused tests, pnpm run check, and pnpm run build passed.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User-driven recovery: drain archive backlog after Phase 1 fixes deployed.

artifact_evidence.compatibility_reason: Legacy poisoned workflow predates contract proof persistence. Original work shipped on trunk (commits in addContractMintTool branch reachable from 46e33ad). 11 tasks completed with verification evidence in executive-summary.md. Contract + review matrix reconstructed via poisoned-history recovery; matrix 13/13 pass.

items.text: `adv_contract_mint` produces a deterministic ChangeContract from an approved agreement with stable IDs, evidence policies, and source hash.
`adv_contract_mint` supports dry-run, force, target-path, and poisoned-history recovery.
`adv_contract_review_matrix_set` persists a typed review matrix through signal or recovery path.
`adv_gate_complete acceptance` accepts an explicit `compatibilityReason` for legacy/replay recovery.
Temporal re-import/re-seed preserves contract, acceptanceCriteria, documents, and artifacts on a Change.
Discovery gate blocks on `DISCOVERY_CONTRACT_MISSING` when agreement is present and contract is absent.
Task `contract_refs` referencing unknown contract items are rejected by validation.
Targeted vitest, `pnpm run check`, and `pnpm run build` pass.
Preserve healthy-path signal semantics for non-recovery contract operations.
No direct ADV state file editing outside the documented recovery helpers.
Do not weaken contract-proof checks; recovery still requires explicit recoveryMode + recoveryEvidence.
Do not silently downgrade missing-workflow errors to poisoned-history recovery.

rows.evidence: Deterministic parser shipped in plugin/src/validator/contract-mint.ts; verified by tk-a9a5bc372ab8 (RED/GREEN passed 4 tests).
adv_contract_mint with dry-run/force/target_path/poisoned-history mode in plugin/src/tools/contract.ts; verified by tk-ba27ebec5f34/tk-d61000bf66c0/tk-ab71cbc8f19e.
adv_contract_review_matrix_set with signal + recovery in plugin/src/tools/contract.ts; verified by tk-ba27ebec5f34.
compatibilityReason argument in adv_gate_complete acceptance gate in plugin/src/tools/gate.ts; verified by tk-c836b7229790 (19 tests passed).
Re-import/re-seed preservation in plugin/src/storage/store-temporal/index.ts + workflow-start.ts; verified by tk-e5ce9e836a9e (14 tests passed).
DISCOVERY_CONTRACT_MISSING readiness blocker in plugin/src/temporal/gate-readiness.ts; verified by tk-29ac117f6fb9 (11 tests passed).
Task contract_refs referential validation in plugin/src/validator/contract.ts (CONTRACT_UNKNOWN_REF + CONTRACT_AC_UNCOVERED).
Executive summary confirms 89-test focused remediation suite + pnpm run check + pnpm run build green.
Healthy-path contract signal preserved; recovery is opt-in via recoveryMode.
No Temporal DB surgery; probe + disk projection only.
recoveryMode + non-empty recoveryEvidence required for every recovery operation.
missing-workflow errors do not authorize recovery (covered by negative test).

acceptanceCriteria: `adv_contract_mint` produces a deterministic ChangeContract from an approved agreement with stable IDs, evidence policies, and source hash.
`adv_contract_mint` supports dry-run, force, target-path, and poisoned-history recovery.
`adv_contract_review_matrix_set` persists a typed review matrix through signal or recovery path.
`adv_gate_complete acceptance` accepts an explicit `compatibilityReason` for legacy/replay recovery.
Temporal re-import/re-seed preserves contract, acceptanceCriteria, documents, and artifacts on a Change.
Discovery gate blocks on `DISCOVERY_CONTRACT_MISSING` when agreement is present and contract is absent.
Task `contract_refs` referencing unknown contract items are rejected by validation.
Targeted vitest, `pnpm run check`, and `pnpm run build` pass.

clarify_findings.message: Scope section is empty or placeholder. What specific files/modules will change?

reentry_history.reason: Fix acceptance-contract orchestration miss discovered at acceptance: discovery did not structurally enforce contract minting, contract mint required a completed discovery timestamp despite docs requiring mint before discovery completion, prep omitted self-application/reload task, and acceptance flow failed late instead of preflighting live tool availability.
reentry_history.scope_delta: Add structural discovery gate contract enforcement, allow contract mint before discovery gate completion with explicit/derived approvedAt, add pre-acceptance contract/live-tool preflight guidance/tests, and add bootstrap self-application/reload task coverage.
